title: Balancer - REKT
relevance_summary: Price manipulation through rounding down logic in linear pools affecting boosted pools

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates prices in linear pools and then interacts with boosted pools

red_flags: Unusual price movements in linear pools followed by interactions with boosted pools
summary: The hack involved price manipulation in linear pools, leading to inappropriate cached token rates in boosted pools. A guard could have detected and blocked transactions manipulating prices in linear pools followed by interactions with boosted pools.
